[[Nomi Sunrider]] used a '''[[Starship/Legends|ship]]''' to travel from [[Exis Station/Legends|Exis Station]] to [[Rhen Var/Legends|Rhen Var]] in [[3986 BBY]].

==Appearances==
*[[Tales of the Jedi – Redemption 4|''Tales of the Jedi – Redemption'' 4]]
*[[Tales of the Jedi – Redemption 5|''Tales of the Jedi – Redemption'' 5]]
